signin.title: Welcome to the Telar Compositor
signin.intro: weaves together images, narrative text, and layered context into interactive visual exhibitions — designed for scholars, built on minimal computing principles.
signin.pitch: This Compositor lets you build and publish your stories visually, so you can focus on research and storytelling instead of spreadsheets, code, or Git.
signin.terms_prefix: By signing in, you agree to the
signin.terms_link: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
signin.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
signin.error: There was a problem signing in. Please check your GitHub permissions and try again.
